meta.disclaimer_from_api: Purely for educational purposes API. Nothing here is real-time. Data refreshed every 20 seconds; endpoint rate limit 120 req/min.

endpoints.description: Per-symbol implied USD MEP (bid/ask/close/mark) computed from ARS line vs D line, plus ARS/USD volumes; covers cedears (306) and the 21 liquid sovereign/bonaer ARS-D bond pairs (panel field: 'cedear'|'bonds').
Per-symbol implied USD CCL from Argentine ticker vs USA ticker (ADR); fields ticker_usa/ticker_ar, CCL_bid/ask/close/mark, ars_volume, volume_rank, panels.
BYMA equity panel (acciones lideres + general), quote fields symbol,c,v,q_bid,px_bid,px_ask,q_ask,q_op,pct_change.
BYMA equity option chains (GFG/YPF/COM etc. option tickers), same quote fields. Not fixed income.
Short-dated Treasury bills segment (Letras): LECAP S*, LECER-pattern X*, dollar-linked D*, TAMAR-margin M*, LB*/BU* letters, plus their MEP (D-suffix) lines. 28 symbols on fetch date.
Corporate bonds / Obligaciones Negociables panel; 556 symbols; ticker triplets ending O (ARS), D (USD MEP), C (USD cable).

Government bonds panel (titulos publicos): hard-dollar sovereigns AL/GD/AE/AN/AO + D/C lines, BOPREAL BPO*, BONCER TX*/TZX*, dollar-linked TZV*, TAMAR duals TT*/TM*, BONCAP/BONTE T*/TO26/TY30P, provincials, legacy par/discount, GDP warrants TVP*. 179 symbols on fetch date.
US-listed ADR quotes, same quote fields.
US stocks quotes, same quote fields.
Daily OHLCV + daily return (dr) + annualized sigma (sa) for ARG stocks; whitelist of ~66 tickers documented in openapi.
Daily OHLCV history for CEDEARs; documented ticker whitelist (~170).

Daily OHLCV history for bonds. WHITELIST ONLY (47 tickers incl. matured: AE38(D) AL29/30/35/41(C/D) BA37D BB37D BC37D BDC28 BPY26 CO26(D) CUAP DICP DIP0 GD29-GD46(C/D) NDT25 PAP0 PARP PBA25 T2X5 TDE25 TO26 TVPA TVPE TVPP TVPY TX25 TX26 TX28). Newer tickers (e.g. TZX26) return HTTP 200 {'Error':'Nahh no tengo ese ticker loko'}. GD30 history spans 2021-09-17 to 2026-06-10 (1152 rows), prices in ARS per 100 VN.
US single-name implied/historical vol analytics (EOD). Not Argentine FI.
US EOD option chains with greeks/IV. Not Argentine FI.
Contact form ('Milton Casco Data Center Inc').

classification.note: Pattern-based pre-classification from live panel of 2026-06-10. Final per-instrument specs (issuer, law, coupon, maturity) to be confirmed against primary sources in the Specs phase.

arg_bonds.hard_dollar_note: AL*=BONAR ley argentina, GD*=Global ley NY, AE38=BONAR 2038. AN29/AO27/AO28 match the BONAR hard-dollar pattern and trade at hard-dollar price levels (ARS ~135k-148k per 100 VN ~= USD 93-102) with full D/C variants and inclusion in the /live/mep 'bonds' panel; they are not in the assistant's pre-2026 knowledge -> flag: confirm issuance docs in Specs phase.
arg_bonds.bopreal_note: BPOA7/BPOB7/BPOC7/BPOD7 = BOPREAL Serie 1 strips A-D (2027). BPOA8/BPOB8 follow the same pattern with year digit 8 (2028) at USD ~91 equivalent -> likely later BOPREAL series strips; series mapping to confirm vs BCRA comunicaciones. BPY26 (Serie 3) absent from live panel (presumed matured May 2026) but present in /historical/bonds whitelist. No BPJ25/Serie 2 lines visible.
arg_bonds.boncer_note: TZX26/27/28 + monthly TZXA7,TZXD6,TZXD7,TZXM7,TZXM8,TZXM9,TZXO6,TZXS7,TZXS8,TZXY7 = zero-coupon CER (BONCER cero cupon). D-lines compress: TZX26->TZX6D, TZX27->TZX7D, TZXD6->TXD6D, TZXA7->TXA7D, TZXM7->TXM7D, TZXS7->TXS7D, TZXS8->TXS8D, TZXD7->TXD7D. TXMJ8/TXMJ9 price at ARS levels (~95/~89), NOT USD levels, so they are separate ARS CER instruments (not D-lines) -> identity unconfirmed, flag.
arg_bonds.dollar_linked_note: TZV26/27/28 quote ARS ~126k-143k per 100 VN, i.e. ~1x the official FX per USD-denominated VN -> dollar-linked zeros. TZV7D = USD MEP line of TZV27 (139450/95.83 ~= 1455 = MEP).
arg_bonds.tamar_note: TTD26/TTJ26/TTS26 = dual TAMAR-vs-fixed bonds (Dec/Jun/Sep 2026); TTD6C/TTD6D/TTJ6D = their USD lines; TTS26 has no live D/C line. TMF27/TMF28/TMG27/TMG28 follow a TAMAR-dual-like T M{month}{year} pattern (F=Feb, G=Aug?) -> confirm in Specs phase.
arg_bonds.boncap_note: T15E7,T30A7,T30J6,T30J7,T31Y7 = BONCAP pattern T{dd}{monthletter}{yr}. TO26 = BONTE 2026 (has TO26C/TO26D). TY30P = BONTE 2030 pesos (USD-subscribed May 2025 issue), TY30C/TY30D its USD lines (price 109.5 ARS vs 0.074 USD per 100 ARS-VN).
arg_bonds.legacy_note: DICP/DIP0 = Discount pesos CER (ley arg/ley NY?), PARP/PAP0/PAY0 = Par pesos CER, CUAP = Cuasipar. DICPC/DICPD = USD lines of DICP.
arg_bonds.gdp_note: Cupones PBI: TVPP (ARS), TVPA (USD ley arg), TVPY (USD ley NY), TVPE (EUR).
arg_bonds.provincial_note: BA37D/BB37D/BC37D (+compressed BA7DC/BA7DD/BB7DC/BB7DD/BC7DD) = Prov. Buenos Aires USD 2037 lines (base board itself is the D line); BC33C/BC33D, BC37E (E-suffix line, basis unconfirmed); BDC28/BDC33/BDC36 = Ciudad de Buenos Aires pattern; CO26/CO32/CO35(+C/D)/COD7/CO2D7 = Cordoba; ERF25/ERM33 (+EF25D/EM33C/EM33D) = Entre Rios; PM29C/PM29D/PMA28/PMD26/PMM29 = Mendoza pattern; NDT25(+NDT5C/NDT5D) = Neuquen; SFD34(+SFD4C/SFD4D) = Santa Fe; PBA27 quoted ~103.7 (USD-level price, basis to confirm).
arg_bonds.other_note: BCIUO (c=206700, O-suffix, looks ON/UVA-like), LK01Q/LK1QD (unknown, c=140870), PR17 (BOCON pattern, c=710.5), PUA36/PUA6C/PUA6D (ARS 161k ~ USD 110 -> hard-dollar-level, issuer unknown), S24DD/SA24D (stale matured-LECAP-pattern D lines, near-zero volume), EF25D/ERF25 (Entre Rios 2025 still quoted post name-implied maturity). All flagged for Specs phase.

arg_notes.lecap_note: S{dd}{monthletter}{yrdigit}: month letters E,F,M,A,Y,J,L,G,S,O,N,D = Ene..Dic. Prices 101-125 ARS per 100 VN (capitalizing bills). D-lines quote ~0.07 USD per 100 ARS-VN (= ARS price / MEP). Compressed D-line naming (SS6D vs S2S6D when two bills share month+year) -> exact base mapping inferred, confirm in Specs phase.
arg_notes.cer_letters_note: X-prefix = CER-adjusted letters (LECER pattern); XL6D/XN6D are USD lines (~0.08).
arg_notes.dollar_linked_note: Quote ~139k-143k ARS per 100 USD-VN ~= official FX; settled in ARS.
arg_notes.tamar_margin_note: M-prefix matches LETAM/TAMAR-margin letter pattern (c=123.5 ARS). Confirm.
arg_notes.other_note: BU* (c ~ 97-105) and LB* (c ~ 97-100, J/L=Jun/Jul 2026) quote near par; instrument family not confirmable from the feed alone -> null classification, resolve in Specs phase (candidates: USD-denominated Treasury letters / BCRA letters).

arg_corp.scheme: Obligaciones Negociables. 5-char tickers: first 3-4 chars = issuer+series code, last char = settlement currency line: O = ARS, D = USD MEP, C = USD cable (CCL). Examples: YM34O/YM34D/YM34C (YPF), TLCMO/TLCMD/TLCMC (Telecom), GN47D/GN47O (TGS pattern), CS44..CS53 (Cresud pattern), IRC* (IRSA), MGC* (Pampa/MGC?), PN3x/PN4x (Pan American pattern), LMS7-9 (Loma Negra pattern), MSS* , VSC*, RZ* etc. Issuer identification deferred to Specs phase.
arg_corp.quirk: Some series quote only a D line (e.g. BF40D, BF45D, MU31D, MU32D, OT41D, JNC5D, YCAMD) - no ARS O line live.

currency_line_convention.summary: BYMA convention mirrored by data912: base ticker = ARS-settled line; suffix D = USD MEP (local settlement); suffix C = USD cable/CCL. When the base ticker already has 5 characters the variant compresses the base to 4 chars before appending D/C (BPOA7->BPA7D/BPA7C, NDT25->NDT5D/NDT5C, TZX26->TZX6D/TZX6C, ERM33->EM33D/EM33C, SFD34->SFD4D/SFD4C, S31L6->SL6D, X30N6->XN6D). Corporates use O/D/C as the final character instead.
currency_line_convention.implied_mep_check: AL30 92700 ARS / AL30D 63.83 USD = 1452.3, matching /live/mep AL30 bid 1452.2952. AL30C 61.60 -> cable below MEP on fetch date.
currency_line_convention.quote_basis: All live prices are per 100 VN (BYMA standard), dirty, in the currency of the line. Consequence: instruments whose face value is in ARS (LECAP, BONCER, duals, BONTE, TVPP) show tiny D-line prices (e.g. S30S6 109.85 ARS vs SS6D 0.076 USD; TZX26 390.85 ARS vs TZX6D 0.27 USD) because 100 VN of ARS face is worth well under 1 USD. Hard-dollar and dollar-linked instruments (USD face) show D lines in the 60-115 range. No evidence of any other quote basis found.

quirks: API self-describes as educational/not-real-time; data refreshed every ~20s; rate limit 120 req/min per endpoint; no auth.

Panel split is by BYMA segment, not instrument family: long LECAP/BONCAP (T30J6, T15E7...), BONCER, duals and BONTE sit in /live/arg_bonds, while /live/arg_notes only holds short-dated letters (28 symbols).

/historical/bonds only serves a frozen 47-ticker whitelist (2020-restructuring-era universe incl. matured T2X5/TX25/TDE25/PBA25/BPY26); unsupported tickers return HTTP 200 with body {'Error':'Nahh no tengo ese ticker loko'}; /historical/notes and /historical/corp do not exist (404).
Historical bond prices are the ARS per-100-VN line (GD30 2021-09-17 c=7165 through 2026-06-10 c=94760, 1152 rows); D/C tickers (e.g. AL30D) are also whitelisted separately.
Stale/likely-matured symbols linger in live arg_bonds with residual quotes and ~zero volume: S24DD, SA24D, EF25D/ERF25, NDT25, PR17, LK01Q, BCIUO - filter by v>0/q_op>0 for production.
Order-book quantity fields contain obvious placeholder orders (q_ask=67,676,767 on BU3S6; q_bid=4.5e9 on T30J6) - do not treat q_bid/q_ask as depth without sanity caps.
px_bid or px_ask of 0.0 means empty side of book (e.g. BU4J6 px_ask=0), not a zero price.

/live/mep covers only 21 sovereign 'bonds'-panel tickers (AE38,AL29,AL30,AL35,AL41,AN29,AO27,AO28,CO26,CO32,CO35,DICP,GD29,GD30,GD35,GD38,GD41,GD46,TO26,TX26,TX28) + 306 cedears; BOPREAL and notes MEP must be computed manually from ARS/D line pairs.
Some D/C variants exist with no live base line (COD7, CO2D7, BF40D, MU31D...) and some bases have no D/C line (TTS26, most provincials' ARS lines).

AN29/AO27/AO28, BPOA8/BPOB8, TMF27/TMF28/TMG27/TMG28, TXMJ8/TXMJ9, PUA36, LBJ26/LBL26, BU3S6/BU4J6 are post-knowledge-cutoff tickers classified by pattern only - hard specs (prospectus/auction docs) required before pricing logic is attached.
Field naming is terse and shared across all live panels: c=last, v=notional volume ARS, q_op=trade count, pct_change=daily %; historical adds dr (daily return) and sa (annualized sigma).
